messages.content: You generate only valid python-pptx code. Use XL_CHART_TYPE (not ChartType) for charts; guard slide.shapes.title for None; return only complete runnable Python code without Markdown fences or section headings.

Generate a Python script using python-pptx to create a 9-slide creative elegant presentation for real estate clients showcasing new property developments. The output file must be named "real_estate_developments.pptx" and all content should be in Italian. Use the standard 4:3 Standard slide size. You are strictly prohibited from using any external APIs or web scraping to fetch data; use hardcoded sample data only. When adding charts, you must explicitly use XL_CHART_TYPE instead of importing or using ChartType from pptx.enum.chart. Additionally, implement defensive programming by ensuring that any attempt to set text on a title shape first checks if slide.shapes.title is not None before accessing .text. Your response must contain distinct # Thinking and # Assistant sections, with code enclosed in ```python fences and non-code text in ```text fences.

import os
from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE


SLIDE_WIDTH = Inches(10)
SLIDE_HEIGHT = Inches(7.5)

NAVY = RGBColor(27, 42, 74)
GOLD = RGBColor(201, 168, 76)
WHITE = RGBColor(255, 255, 255)
LIGHT_GRAY = RGBColor(245, 245, 245)
DARK_TEXT = RGBColor(45, 45, 45)
MEDIUM_GRAY = RGBColor(160, 160, 160)

FONT_HEADING = "Calibri"
FONT_BODY = "Calibri"

LEFT_MARGIN = Inches(0.6)
RIGHT_MARGIN = Inches(0.6)
TOP_MARGIN = Inches(0.5)


def hex_to_rgb(hex_str):
    h = hex_str.lstrip("#")
    return RGBColor(int(h[0:2], 16), int(h[2:4], 16), int(h[4:6], 16))


def set_slide_background(slide, color_hex="#FFFFFF"):
    background = slide.background
    fill = background.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)


def add_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, text, font_size=14, bold=False, alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT, font_name=FONT_BODY, color=DARK_TEXT):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.text = text
    p.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    p.font.bold = bold
    p.font.name = font_name
    p.font.color.rgb = color
    p.alignment = alignment
    return txBox


def add_shape(slide, shape_type, left, top, width, height, fill_color=None, line_color=None):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(shape_type, left, top, width, height)
    if fill_color:
        shape.fill.solid()
        shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = fill_color
    else:
        shape.fill.background()
    if line_color:
        shape.line.color.rgb = line_color
        shape.line.width = Pt(1)
    return shape


def add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, title_text, body_text, accent_color=GOLD):
    card_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    card_shape.fill.solid()
    card_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = WHITE
    card_shape.line.color.rgb = RGBColor(220, 220, 220)
    card_shape.line.width = Pt(1)

    accent_bar = add_shape(slide, MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left + Inches(0.15), top + Inches(0.15), Inches(0.08), height - Inches(0.3), fill_color=accent_color)
    accent_bar.line.fill.background()

    title_box = add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.4), top + Inches(0.2), width - Inches(0.6), Inches(0.5), title_text, font_size=16, bold=True, color=NAVY)
    body_box = add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.4), top + Inches(0.75), width - Inches(0.6), height - Inches(1.0), body_text, font_size=12, color=DARK_TEXT)

    return card_shape


def add_section_label(slide, text, left, top):
    label_box = add_text_box(slide, left, top, Inches(4), Inches(0.35), text.upper(), font_size=10, bold=True, color=GOLD, alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT)
    return label_box


def add_footer(slide, page_number):
    footer_text = f"real_estate_developments.pptx  |  {page_number}"
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(7.1), Inches(8.8), Inches(0.3), footer_text, font_size=9, color=MEDIUM_GRAY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, path, left, top, width, height):
    if os.path.exists(path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(path, left, top, width, height)
    else:
        placeholder = add_shape(slide, MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height, fill_color=LIGHT_GRAY)
        placeholder.line.color.rgb = MEDIUM_GRAY
        placeholder.line.width = Pt(1.5)
        icon_text = "📷"
        add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.3), top + (height - Inches(0.6)) / 2, width - Inches(0.6), Inches(0.5), icon_text, font_size=24, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)


def build_title_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#1B2A4A")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = ""
        title_shape.clear()

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(1.5), Inches(8.4), Inches(1.2), "Sviluppi Immobiliari", font_size=44, bold=True, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER, color=GOLD)
    add_shape(slide, MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(3.5), Inches(3.0), Inches(3.0), Inches(0.06), fill_color=GOLD)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.2), Inches(3.4), Inches(7.6), Inches(0.8), "Presentazione dei Nuovi Progetti Residenziali e Commerciali", font_size=20, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER, color=WHITE)

    company_name = add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(5.5), Inches(7.0), Inches(0.4), "Studio Immobiliare Premium  |  Milano — Roma — Firenze", font_size=13, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER, color=MEDIUM_GRAY)

    add_footer(slide, 1)


def build_introduction_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FFFFFF")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = ""
        title_shape.clear()

    add_section_label(slide, "Introduzione", Inches(0.6), Inches(0.7))
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.2), Inches(8.8), Inches(0.8), "I Nostri Progetti Immobiliari", font_size=32, bold=True, color=NAVY)

    intro_body = (
        "Il nostro portafoglio immobiliare comprende progetti di eccellenza in tutta Italia.\n"
        "Ogni sviluppo è progettato con attenzione al design contemporaneo,\n"
        "alla sostenibilità ambientale e alla qualità della vita dei residenti."
    )
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(2.1), Inches(5.5), Inches(2.0), intro_body, font_size=14, color=DARK_TEXT)

    icon_shape = add_shape(slide, MSO_SHAPE.CUBE, Inches(7.0), Inches(2.0), Inches(2.5), Inches(2.5), fill_color=GOLD)
    icon_shape.line.fill.background()

    bullets_text = (
        "• 4 progetti esclusivi in fase di realizzazione\n"
        "• Oltre 350 unità residenziali totali\n"
        "• Certificazione energetica A4 garantita\n"
        "• Consegna prevista entro il 2026"
    )
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(7.0), Inches(4.8), Inches(2.5), Inches(2.0), bullets_text, font_size=13, color=DARK_TEXT)

    add_footer(slide, 2)


def build_property_1_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FFFFFF")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = ""
        title_shape.clear()

    add_section_label(slide, "Progetto Residenziale", Inches(0.6), Inches(0.7))
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.2), Inches(8.8), Inches(0.8), "Villa Serena — Milano", font_size=30, bold=True, color=NAVY)

    add_image_or_placeholder(slide, "assets/villa_serena.jpg", Inches(0.6), Inches(2.1), Inches(4.5), Inches(3.5))

    desc = (
        "Complesso residenziale di lusso nel cuore di Milano.\n"
        "Appartamenti dal 2 al 5 locali con terrazzi panoramici,\n"
        "piscina privata e giardino condominiale."
    )
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(5.8), Inches(4.5), Inches(1.3), desc, font_size=12, color=DARK_TEXT)

    specs = (
        "Superficie: 120-280 m²\n"
        "Camere: da 2 a 5\n"
        "Piani: dal 2° al 6°\n"
        "Consegna: Q3 2026"
    )
    add_card(slide, Inches(5.4), Inches(2.1), Inches(4.0), Inches(3.5), "Specifiche", specs)

    add_footer(slide, 3)


def build_property_2_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FFFFFF")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = ""
        title_shape.clear()

    add_section_label(slide, "Progetto Residenziale", Inches(0.6), Inches(0.7))
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.2), Inches(8.8), Inches(0.8), "Torre Aurelia — Roma", font_size=30, bold=True, color=NAVY)

    add_image_or_placeholder(slide, "assets/torre_aurelia.jpg", Inches(0.6), Inches(2.1), Inches(4.5), Inches(3.5))

    desc = (
        "Grattacielo residenziale da 28 piani nel quartiere EUR.\n"
        "Vista panoramica sulla città, servizi di concierge\n"
        "e area wellness con spa privata."
    )
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(5.8), Inches(4.5), Inches(1.3), desc, font_size=12, color=DARK_TEXT)

    specs = (
        "Superficie: 90-350 m²\n"
        "Camere: da 1 a 6\n"
        "Piani: dal 5° al 28°\n"
        "Consegna: Q4 2027"
    )
    add_card(slide, Inches(5.4), Inches(2.1), Inches(4.0), Inches(3.5), "Specifiche", specs)

    add_footer(slide, 4)


def build_property_3_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FFFFFF")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = ""
        title_shape.clear()

    add_section_label(slide, "Progetto Residenziale", Inches(0.6), Inches(0.7))
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.2), Inches(8.8), Inches(0.8), "Residenza del Parco — Firenze", font_size=30, bold=True, color=NAVY)

    add_image_or_placeholder(slide, "assets/residenza_parco.jpg", Inches(0.6), Inches(2.1), Inches(4.5), Inches(3.5))

    desc = (
        "Residence di charme immerso nel verde della Toscana.\n"
        "Ville indipendenti con giardino privato,\n"
        "vicino al centro storico e alle principali attrazioni."
    )
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(5.8), Inches(4.5), Inches(1.3), desc, font_size=12, color=DARK_TEXT)

    specs = (
        "Superficie: 180-450 m²\n"
        "Camere: da 3 a 7\n"
        "Piani: 1-2 livelli\n"
        "Consegna: Q2 2026"
    )
    add_card(slide, Inches(5.4), Inches(2.1), Inches(4.0), Inches(3.5), "Specifiche", specs)

    add_footer(slide, 5)


def build_property_4_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FFFFFF")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = ""
        title_shape.clear()

    add_section_label(slide, "Progetto Residenziale", Inches(0.6), Inches(0.7))
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.2), Inches(8.8), Inches(0.8), "Borgo Antico — Napoli", font_size=30, bold=True, color=NAVY)

    add_image_or_placeholder(slide, "assets/borgo_antico.jpg", Inches(0.6), Inches(2.1), Inches(4.5), Inches(3.5))

    desc = (
        "Ristrutturazione di un borgo storico del XVIII secolo.\n"
        "Appartamenti di pregio con affreschi originali restaurati,\n"
        "cortile interno e vista sul golfo."
    )
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(5.8), Inches(4.5), Inches(1.3), desc, font_size=12, color=DARK_TEXT)

    specs = (
        "Superficie: 100-300 m²\n"
        "Camere: da 2 a 5\n"
        "Piani: dal 1° al 4°\n"
        "Consegna: Q1 2027"
    )
    add_card(slide, Inches(5.4), Inches(2.1), Inches(4.0), Inches(3.5), "Specifiche", specs)

    add_footer(slide, 6)


def build_market_chart_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FFFFFF")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = ""
        title_shape.clear()

    add_section_label(slide, "Analisi di Mercato", Inches(0.6), Inches(0.7))
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.2), Inches(8.8), Inches(0.8), "Andamento dei Prezzi Medi per m² (€)", font_size=30, bold=True, color=NAVY)

    from pptx.chart.data import CategoryChartData
    chart_data = CategoryChartData()
    chart_data.categories = ["Q1 2023", "Q2 2023", "Q3 2023", "Q4 2023", "Q1 2024", "Q2 2024", "Q3 2024", "Q4 2024"]
    chart_data.add_series("Prezzi Medi (€/m²)", (3850, 3920, 4010, 4100, 4250, 4380, 4520, 4680))

    left = Inches(1.0)
    top = Inches(2.2)
    width = Inches(8.0)
    height = Inches(4.0)

    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(XL_CHART_TYPE.COLUMN_CLUSTERED, left, top, width, height, chart_data)
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    chart.has_legend = False
    plot = chart.plots[0]
    series = plot.series[0]
    series.format.fill.solid()
    series.format.fill.fore_color.rgb = GOLD

    value_axis = chart.value_axis
    value_axis.maximum_scale = 5200
    value_axis.major_gridlines.format.line.color.rgb = RGBColor(230, 230, 230)

    cat_axis = chart.category_axis
    cat_axis.tick_labels.font.size = Pt(10)
    val_tick_labels = value_axis.tick_labels
    val_tick_labels.font.size = Pt(9)

    add_footer(slide, 7)


def build_investment_highlights_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FFFFFF")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = ""
        title_shape.clear()

    add_section_label(slide, "Investimento", Inches(0.6), Inches(0.7))
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.2), Inches(8.8), Inches(0.8), "Indicatori Chiave di Performance", font_size=30, bold=True, color=NAVY)

    kpi_data = [
        ("ROI Medio Annuo", "+12.4%", "Rendimento superiore alla media di mercato"),
        ("Occupazione Media", "96.8%", "Tasso di locazione stabile nel tempo"),
        ("Valore Plusvalenza", "+34%", "Incremento medio del valore immobiliare"),
    ]

    card_width = Inches(2.7)
    card_height = Inches(2.5)
    gap = Inches(0.3)
    total_width = card_width * 3 + gap * 2
    start_x = (SLIDE_WIDTH - total_width) / 2
    y_pos = Inches(2.4)

    for i, (title, value, desc) in enumerate(kpi_data):
        x = start_x + i * (card_width + gap)
        add_card(slide, x, y_pos, card_width, card_height, title, f"{value}\n\n{desc}")

    summary_text = "I nostri progetti offrono rendimenti stabili e crescita del valore immobiliare nel lungo termine."
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.0), Inches(5.3), Inches(8.0), Inches(0.6), summary_text, font_size=14, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER, color=DARK_TEXT)

    add_footer(slide, 8)


def build_contact_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#1B2A4A")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = ""
        title_shape.clear()

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(1.5), Inches(8.4), Inches(1.0), "Contattaci", font_size=36, bold=True, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER, color=GOLD)
    add_shape(slide, MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(3.5), Inches(2.7), Inches(3.0), Inches(0.06), fill_color=GOLD)

    contact_lines = (
        "Studio Immobiliare Premium\n"
        "Via Monte Napoleone 8, Milano\n"
        "+39 02 1234567\n"
        "info@studiopremium.it\n"
        "www.studiopremium.it"
    )
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(2.0), Inches(3.2), Inches(6.0), Inches(2.5), contact_lines, font_size=16, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER, color=WHITE)

    closing = "Grazie per il vostro interesse — Siamo a disposizione per consulenze personalizzate."
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.0), Inches(5.8), Inches(8.0), Inches(0.7), closing, font_size=14, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER, color=MEDIUM_GRAY)

    add_footer(slide, 9)


def main():
    prs = Presentation()
    prs.slide_width = SLIDE_WIDTH
    prs.slide_height = SLIDE_HEIGHT

    build_title_slide(prs)
    build_introduction_slide(prs)
    build_property_1_slide(prs)
    build_property_2_slide(prs)
    build_property_3_slide(prs)
    build_property_4_slide(prs)
    build_market_chart_slide(prs)
    build_investment_highlights_slide(prs)
    build_contact_slide(prs)

    prs.save("real_estate_developments.pptx")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
